2013-T4-P5-S1.trunk: S+并列谓语：Two of the three objecting Justices … agreed … but disagreed …（三位持异议法官中的两位 认同…但不认同…）
structure: 主句主语：Two of the three objecting Justices
└ 破折号同位语〔点明那两位〕：Samuel Alito and Clarence Thomas
并列谓语(but)：agreed with this Constitutional logic / disagreed about which Arizona rules conflicted with the federal statute
└ 宾语从句(which，作 about 的宾语)：which Arizona rules conflicted with the federal statute
2013-T4-P5-S1.logic: 主语 Two of the three… Justices（破折号同位语点名）；并列谓语 agreed but disagreed；about 后 which 引导宾语从句。
notes: 破折号夹的 Samuel Alito and Clarence Thomas 是同位语（点明那两位法官）。
并列谓语：agreed with… but disagreed about…。
which Arizona rules conflicted…：which 引导介词 about 的宾语从句（哪些亚利桑那规定与联邦法冲突）。

2013-T4-P4-S1.trunk: S+V+O：the Justices said that …（法官们表示…）
structure: └ 宾语从句(that)：Arizona police would be allowed to verify the legal status of people …
└ 定语从句〔who，修饰 people〕：who come in contact with law enforcement
2013-T4-P4-S1.logic: that 引导 said 的宾语从句；be allowed to do 被动（获准）；who 定语从句修饰 people。
notes: that 引导 said 的宾语从句。
be allowed to do：被动（获准做…）。
who come in contact with law enforcement：who 定语从句修饰 people；come in contact with 与…接触。

2013-T4-P1-S2.trunk: S+be+表：the decision was an 8-0 defeat for the Administration's effort（这一裁决是对政府那一努力 8 比 0 的挫败）
structure: 状语：But on the more important matter of the Constitution
主句：the decision was an 8-0 defeat for the Administration's effort
└ 不定式作定语〔修饰 effort〕：to upset the balance of power between the federal government and the states
2013-T4-P1-S2.logic: 主系表（the decision was a defeat for the effort）；to upset… 不定式修饰 effort；between… 介词短语修饰 balance of power。
notes: the decision was an 8-0 defeat for … effort：主系表结构。
to upset the balance of power 不定式作定语修饰 effort（打破权力平衡的努力）。
upset 在此=打破、扰乱；between the federal government and the states 修饰 balance of power。
